summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SAE (Sistema de Asistencia Escolar) - Backend APIs working well (93.8% success), Frontend fully functional with localhost backend connection, but external URL routing issue identified

flaky_endpoints.issue: Invalid login test occasionally fails with timeout
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor - authentication security still works correctly

infrastructure_issues.impact: Frontend cannot connect to backend via external URL

integration_issues.issue: External backend URL (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL) not accessible - returns 404
integration_issues.workaround: Application works perfectly when using localhost:8001

passed_tests: Student CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Get attendance records and today's records
Navigation between all sections (Students, Scanner, Records, Reports, Admin)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix external URL routing - https://sysbqawd-ykdz-8001.preview.emergentagent.com/api/* returns 404. Backend works on localhost:8001 but external routing is broken. This prevents frontend from connecting to backend in production environment.
